scripts.mobile:init: pnpm --filter @finnbiz/web i @capacitor/core @capacitor/cli && npx -p @capacitor/cli cap init FinNBiz com.finnbiz.app --web-dir=out
scripts.mobile:android:add: pnpm --filter @finnbiz/web i @capacitor/android && npx -p @capacitor/cli cap add android
scripts.mobile:build: pnpm --filter @finnbiz/web build:mobile && cd apps/web && npx -p @capacitor/cli cap sync android
scripts.mobile:android: cd apps/web && npx -p @capacitor/cli cap open android
